hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git.*commit' || exit 0; SW_FILE="/Users/leisvik/Documents/Claude/Projects/Sicilien/sw.js"; [ -f "$SW_FILE" ] || exit 0; CURRENT=$(sed -n "s/.*la-sicilia-v\([0-9]*\).*/\1/p" "$SW_FILE" | head -1); [ -n "$CURRENT" ] || exit 0; NEXT=$((CURRENT + 1)); perl -i -pe "s/la-sicilia-v${CURRENT}/la-sicilia-v${NEXT}/g" "$SW_FILE"; git -C "/Users/leisvik/Documents/Claude/Projects/Sicilien" add "$SW_FILE"
